arts.ttl: Napoli to Try Again to Lure Pellegrini Away from Roma
arts.sum: Lorenzo Pellegrini eventually decided to stay at Roma in January after Napoli started courting him, but it’s not certain that will be the case long-term. He and the Giallorossi will soon have to sit down to discuss a renewal soon. The post Napoli to Try Again to Lure Pellegrini Away from Roma appeared first on The Cult of Calcio.
